summary: Regression test after deployment fixes: JWT_SECRET fallback removal and /admin/stats aggregation optimization. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Admin dashboard loads correctly with stats and recent bookings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT_SECRET fix confirmed working (os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] without fallback). /admin/stats $facet aggregation returns all 9 required fields correctly. Admin login with prachikhule05@gmail.com/Prachi@2799 works. Services API returns list. Booking creation works with correct fields: location, time, mobile, houseNo, street, pincode, expectedPrice, gst, grandTotal.
